INVOKE.COMMENT: get friend's detail from social interaction members table

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

MAP.COMMENT: map friend's social interactions members data
update friend interaction status to uninvited

INVOKE.COMMENT: save updated social interaction members data to DB

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

MAP.COMMENT: api call is success, do nothing

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to update social interactions members data to DB. Error: %results/message%. Social Interaction ID: %socialInteractionsDoc/socialInteractionId%. Friend Entity Number: %friendEntityNumber%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to uninvite friend as friend interaction status is not INVITED. Social Interaction ID: %socialInteractionsDoc/socialInteractionId%. Friend Entity Number: %friendEntityNumber%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve social interactions members data from DB. Error: %results/message%. Social Interaction ID: %socialInteractionsDoc/socialInteractionId%. Friend Entity Number: %friendEntityNumber%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
